summary: Comprehensive testing of PANS Victoria website completed successfully. Backend APIs are 100% functional, frontend UI is working properly with all navigation, forms, and AI chat operational.

minor_issues.issue: Frontend .env had incorrect backend URL (pans-victoria-xfawpg vs 9adadd97-aa8f-44ac-8dfc)
minor_issues.impact: Fixed - updated to correct URL from review request

ui_bugs.issue: Chat toggle button has CSS animation stability issue causing intermittent click failures
ui_bugs.workaround: Using force=True click resolves the issue - likely due to hover/animation effects

design_issues.issue: Google Fonts @import appears after other CSS rules in build

passed_tests: All Navigation Links (About, Who We Support, Services, Process, First 48 Hours, Resources, Contact)
Contact Form UI (all fields, validation, success message)
AI Chat UI (button, window, input, responses)
Resource Links with Security Attributes (4/4 working)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 features working - minor chat button stability)
